item.title: Vietnam War Stories from Veterans
item.description: Veterans share personal accounts of the Vietnam War. Reflecting on combat experiences, challenges, and the lasting human cost of service during the conflict.

media:content.media:title: Vietnam War Stories from Veterans
media:content.media:description: Veterans share personal accounts of the Vietnam War. Reflecting on combat experiences, challenges, and the lasting human cost of service during the conflict.

item.title: Jackie Kennedy After JFK Shooting
item.description: A look at Jackie Kennedy’s words and actions following the shooting of JFK. Covering her immediate response, emotions, and historical impact during a national tragedy.

media:content.media:title: Jackie Kennedy After JFK Shooting
media:content.media:description: A look at Jackie Kennedy’s words and actions following the shooting of JFK. Covering her immediate response, emotions, and historical impact during a national tragedy.

item.title: H.R. McMaster in Operation Desert Storm
item.description: A look at H.R. McMaster’s military service during Operation Desert Storm. Covering his role, leadership experience, and involvement in the Gulf War conflict.

media:content.media:title: H.R. McMaster in Operation Desert Storm
media:content.media:description: A look at H.R. McMaster’s military service during Operation Desert Storm. Covering his role, leadership experience, and involvement in the Gulf War conflict.

item.title: WWII Paratrooper on the Great Depression
item.description: A WWII paratrooper reflects on growing up during the Great Depression. Sharing memories of hardship, resilience, and how early life shaped wartime service.

media:content.media:title: WWII Paratrooper on the Great Depression
media:content.media:description: A WWII paratrooper reflects on growing up during the Great Depression. Sharing memories of hardship, resilience, and how early life shaped wartime service.

item.title: Untold Stories from Two Veterans
item.description: Two veterans share lesser-known personal accounts from their service. Reflecting on experiences, challenges, and moments that were rarely spoken about after returning home.

media:content.media:title: Untold Stories from Two Veterans
media:content.media:description: Two veterans share lesser-known personal accounts from their service. Reflecting on experiences, challenges, and moments that were rarely spoken about after returning home.

item.title: Meeting a General on Omaha Beach
item.description: A personal wartime story about unexpectedly encountering a general during the Omaha Beach operation. A reflection on intense moments, leadership, and battlefield chaos.

media:content.media:title: Meeting a General on Omaha Beach
media:content.media:description: A personal wartime story about unexpectedly encountering a general during the Omaha Beach operation. A reflection on intense moments, leadership, and battlefield chaos.

item.title: Baptism of Fire on Normandy Shores
item.description: A firsthand account of intense combat during the Normandy landings. Sharing the chaos, fear, and defining moments experienced on the beaches of D-Day.

media:content.media:title: Baptism of Fire on Normandy Shores
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of intense combat during the Normandy landings. Sharing the chaos, fear, and defining moments experienced on the beaches of D-Day.

item.title: WWII Bombardier on German Flak Threat
item.description: WWII bombardier Paul “Bud” Haedike explains why anti-aircraft flak was often more dangerous than enemy fighters. A firsthand look at air combat challenges.

media:content.media:title: WWII Bombardier on German Flak Threat
media:content.media:description: WWII bombardier Paul “Bud” Haedike explains why anti-aircraft flak was often more dangerous than enemy fighters. A firsthand look at air combat challenges.

item.title: Why German Soldiers Fought on the Eastern Front
item.description: A historical look at why German soldiers continued fighting against Soviet forces. Exploring battlefield conditions, leadership pressure, and wartime survival factors.

media:content.media:title: Why German Soldiers Fought on the Eastern Front
media:content.media:description: A historical look at why German soldiers continued fighting against Soviet forces. Exploring battlefield conditions, leadership pressure, and wartime survival factors.

item.title: Col. William F. Andrews in the Gulf War
item.description: A look at Colonel William F. Andrews’ service during the Gulf War. Covering leadership decisions, operational challenges, and military experience in the conflict.

media:content.media:title: Col. William F. Andrews in the Gulf War
media:content.media:description: A look at Colonel William F. Andrews’ service during the Gulf War. Covering leadership decisions, operational challenges, and military experience in the conflict.

item.title: Veteran Reflects on a Life-Changing Battle
item.description: A veteran shares a personal account of a defining battle experience. Covering the impact, challenges faced, and how it shaped life after military service.

media:content.media:title: Veteran Reflects on a Life-Changing Battle
media:content.media:description: A veteran shares a personal account of a defining battle experience. Covering the impact, challenges faced, and how it shaped life after military service.

item.title: Post-WWII Military Missions Explained
item.description: A look at American service members’ missions after WWII. Covering occupation duties, reconstruction efforts, and continued military operations in the postwar period.

media:content.media:title: Post-WWII Military Missions Explained
media:content.media:description: A look at American service members’ missions after WWII. Covering occupation duties, reconstruction efforts, and continued military operations in the postwar period.
